description_long: This futuristic shotgun features a compact, bullpup-style design with a predominantly matte white and black exterior accented by red highlights. The main body is constructed from a robust, angular frame with visible panel lines, screws, and a reinforced barrel shroud. A cylindrical barrel assembly runs through the center, partially exposed and flanked by a ribbed upper rail, likely for mounting optics or accessories. The rear features a skeletal, retractable stock and a prominent sighting device mounted on top. The grip area is ergonomically shaped with a large, squared trigger guard and visible control buttons or switches near the trigger. Subtle wear and surface scuffs suggest heavy-duty use in urban environments.
description: A compact, futuristic bullpup shotgun with a white and black angular body, ribbed upper rail, and retractable skeletal stock. Red accents and visible control buttons highlight its advanced, tactical design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the angular body, ribbed upper rail, exposed barrel, and retractable skeletal stock.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the muzzle, ribbed rail, and sighting device, emphasizing the weapon's compact width and symmetrical design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the grip, trigger guard, and control buttons.
description_view_3: Rear view highlighting the skeletal stock, rear sight, and the alignment of the upper rail and barrel.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a cylindrical, centrally aligned barrel and ribbed upper rail
attribute_trigger_guard_design: large, squared trigger guard with reinforced edges and a spacious opening
